creator: thefloridaqueenie
caption:
Looking for things to do around Florida? Comment "Guide" and I'll send you my interactive Florida map and guide with over 1,000 spots to explore! I did the work for you so you can just hit the road without hours of research and stress!

Did you know there’s a Greek town in Florida where you can find amazing Greek restaurants and bakeries, and is the sponge capital of the world??? 

Welcome to Tarpon Springs!! 

Tarpon Springs is located on the central west coast of Florida about 45 minutes from Tampa. 

I went here recently and was so pleasantly surprised. There’s Greek music playing in the streets, adorable soap and sponge shops and great Greek and seafood restaurants to eat at. 

#thingstodoinflorida #floridahiddengems #floridabucketlist #tarponsprings
